heading: “Member of the former ruling family” defined
label: 4328 “Member of the former ruling family” defined
text: As used in this chapter, the term “member of the former ruling family” means (1) any person who was at any time between , and , the German Emperor or the ruler of any constituent kingdom of the German Empire, or (2) the wife or any child of such person.April 6, 1917July 2, 1921
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Trading with the enemy Act, also known as the Trading with the Enemy Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Oct. 6, 1917, ch. 10640 Stat. 411section 4301 of this title
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 31 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
